hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Session done. If .kt files changed, run: ./gradlew :app:compileLiteDebugKotlin"}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '^/home/khapv/\.claude/(CLAUDE\.md|skills/)' | while read -r f; do
  if [[ "$f" == *CLAUDE.md ]]; then
    cp "$f" /home/khapv/Claude_Usage/my_claude_skills/CLAUDE.md
  elif [[ "$f" == *skills/* ]]; then
    rsync -a /home/khapv/.claude/skills/ /home/khapv/Claude_Usage/my_claude_skills/skills/
  fi
done 2>/dev/null || true
